metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Network Session ASIM parser for Cisco FTD
properties.query:
let parser = (
    disabled:bool = false,
    pack:bool = false
)
{
    let FTDBase =
        CommonSecurityLog
        | where not(disabled)
        | where DeviceVendor == "Cisco" and DeviceProduct == "FTD"
        | where DeviceEventClassID in (
            '430001', //intrusion event
            '430002', //connection event logged at the beginning of the connection
            '430003', //connection event logged at the end of the connection
            '430005', //file malware event
            '430007' //elephant Flow
        )
        | project-rename
            Raw = Message, //Message used in Intrusion logs
            EventUid = _ItemId,
            DvcIpAddr = DeviceAddress,
            EventOriginalType = DeviceEventClassID
        | extend
            Raw = trim_start(@'%FTD-\d+-\d+:', Raw),
            Hostname = coalesce(DeviceName, Computer, '')
        | parse-kv Raw as (
            DeviceUUID: string,
            InstanceID: string,
            FirstPacketSecond: datetime,
            ConnectionID: string,
            SrcIP: string,
            DstIP: string,
            SrcPort: int,
            DstPort: int,
            Protocol: string,
            IngressInterface: string,
            EgressInterface: string,
            ACPolicy: string,
            AccessControlRuleName: string,
            IngressVRF: string,
            EgressVRF: string,
            IngressZone: string,
            EgressZone: string,
            NAPPolicy: string
        ) with (pair_delimiter=',', kv_delimiter=':')
        | project-rename
            EventStartTime = FirstPacketSecond,
            DvcInboundInterface = IngressInterface,
            DvcOutboundInterface = EgressInterface,
            DvcId = DeviceUUID,
            EventOriginalUid = ConnectionID,
            DvcZone = IngressVRF,
            DstIpAddr = DstIP,
            SrcIpAddr = SrcIP,
            SrcPortNumber = SrcPort,
            DstPortNumber = DstPort,
            DstZone = EgressZone,
            NetworkRuleName = AccessControlRuleName,
            DvcDescription = NAPPolicy
        | extend
            EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
            EventProductVersion = tostring(split(Raw, '-')[1]),
            NetworkProtocol = toupper(Protocol)
    ;
    let Intrusion =
        FTDBase
        | where EventOriginalType == '430001'
        | parse-kv Raw as (
            Priority: string,
            GID: int,
            SID: int,
            Revision: int,
            Message: string,
            Classification: string,
            IntrusionPolicy: string,
            InlineResult: string,
            SnortRuleGroups: string,
            MitreAttackGroups: string
        ) with (pair_delimiter=',', kv_delimiter=':')
        | project-rename
            EventOriginalResultDetails = InlineResult,
            EventMessage = Message,
            EventOriginalSeverity = Priority,
            NetworkRuleNumber = SID,
            ThreatCategory = Classification
        | extend
            ThreatName = EventMessage,
            ThreatId = strcat(GID, ':', NetworkRuleNumber, ':', Revision)
        | extend
            EventType = 'IDS',
            EventResult = iff(EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Alert', 'Block', 'Would block'), 'Success', 'Failure'),
            DvcAction = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Alert', 'Would block'), 'Allow',
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Block', 'Deny',
                ''
            ),
            EventResultDetails = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Would block', 'Simulation',
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Block', 'Terminated',
                'NA'
            ),
            EventSeverity = case(
                EventOriginalSeverity == '1', 'High',
                EventOriginalSeverity == '2', 'Medium',
                EventOriginalSeverity == '3', 'Low',
                'Informational'
            ),
            AdditionalFields = iff(
                pack,
                bag_pack(
                    'InstanceID', InstanceID,
                    'ACPolicy', ACPolicy,
                    'IntrusionPolicy', IntrusionPolicy,
                    'SnortRuleGroups', SnortRuleGroups,
                    'MitreAttackGroups', MitreAttackGroups
                ),
                dynamic({})
            ),
            ThreatConfidence = int(null)
    ;
    let Connections =
        FTDBase
        | where EventOriginalType in (
            '430002',
            '430003',
            '430007'
        )
        | parse-kv Raw as (
            EventPriority: string,
            AccessControlRuleAction: string,
            ['Prefilter Policy']: string,
            User: string,
            InitiatorPackets: long,
            ResponderPackets: long,
            InitiatorBytes: long,
            ResponderBytes: long,
            ClientAppDetector: string,
            Client: string,
            ApplicationProtocol: string,
            ConnectionDuration: int,
            DNSQuery: string,
            DNSRecordType: string,
            DNSResponseType: string,
            DNS_TTL: long,
            ReferencedHost: string,
            AccessControlRuleReason: string,
            SLActualAction: string,
            SSLExpectedAction: string,
            URL: string,
            NAT_InitiatorPort: int,
            NAT_ResponderPort: int,
            NAT_InitiatorIP: string,
            NAT_ResponderIP: string,
            EVE_Fingerprint: string,
            EVE_Process: string,
            EVE_ProcessConfidencePct: string,
            EVE_ThreatConfidencePct: int,
            EVE_ThreatConfidenceIndex: string
        ) with (pair_delimiter=',', kv_delimiter=':')
        | project-rename
            PrefilterPolicy = ['Prefilter Policy'],
            EventOriginalResultDetails = AccessControlRuleAction,
            EventOriginalSeverity = EventPriority,
            NetworkApplicationProtocol = ApplicationProtocol,
            NetworkDuration = ConnectionDuration,
            DstBytes = ResponderBytes,
            SrcBytes = InitiatorBytes,
            DstPackets = ResponderPackets,
            SrcPackets = InitiatorPackets,
            SrcUsername = User,
            SrcAppName = Client,
            ThreatCategory = AccessControlRuleReason,
            SrcNatIpAddr = NAT_InitiatorIP,
            SrcNatPortNumber = NAT_InitiatorPort,
            DstNatIpAddr = NAT_ResponderIP,
            DstNatPortNumber = NAT_ResponderPort
        | extend
            EventType = 'NetworkSession',
            EventSubType = case(
                EventOriginalType == '430002', 'Start',
                EventOriginalType == '430003', 'End',
                ''
            ),
            EventResult = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Block', 'Block with reset'), 'Failure', 
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Allow', 'Fastpath', 'Trust'), 'Success',
                ''
                ),
            DvcAction = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Allow', 'Fastpath', 'Trust'), 'Allow',
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Block', 'Deny',
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Block with reset', 'Reset',
                ''
            ),
            EventResultDetails = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Block', 'Drop'), 'Terminated',
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Block with reset', 'Reset',
                EventOriginalResultDetails in ('Allow', 'Fastpath', 'Trust'), 'NA',
                'Unknown'
            ),
            EventSeverity = case(
                EventOriginalSeverity =~ 'High', 'High',
                EventOriginalSeverity =~ 'Medium', 'Medium',
                EventOriginalSeverity =~ 'Low', 'Low',
                'Informational'
            ),
            ThreatConfidence = EVE_ThreatConfidencePct,
            EventReportUrl = coalesce(URL, DNSQuery),
            EventMessage = strcat(SrcIpAddr, ':', SrcPortNumber, ' -> ', DstIpAddr, ':', DstPortNumber, ' [', EventOriginalResultDetails, ']'),
            NetworkBytes = DstBytes + SrcBytes,
            NetworkPackets = DstPackets + SrcPackets,
            AdditionalFields = iff(
                pack,
                bag_pack(
                    'InstanceID', InstanceID,
                    'ACPolicy', ACPolicy,
                    'PrefilterPolicy', PrefilterPolicy,
                    'DNSQuery', DNSQuery,
                    'DNSRecordType', DNSRecordType,
                    'DNSResponseType', DNSResponseType,
                    'DNS_TTL', DNS_TTL,
                    'ReferencedHost', ReferencedHost,
                    'SLActualAction', SLActualAction,
                    'SSLExpectedAction', SSLExpectedAction,
                    'URL', URL,
                    'EVE_Fingerprint', EVE_Fingerprint,
                    'EVE_Process', EVE_Process,
                    'EVE_ProcessConfidencePct', EVE_ProcessConfidencePct,
                    'EVE_ThreatConfidencePct', EVE_ThreatConfidencePct,
                    'EVE_ThreatConfidenceIndex', EVE_ThreatConfidenceIndex
                ),
                dynamic({})
            )
    ;
    let File =
        FTDBase
        | where EventOriginalType == '430005'
        | parse-kv Raw as (
            FileDirection: string,
            FileAction: string,
            FileSHA256: string,
            SHA_Disposition: string,
            SperoDisposition: string,
            ThreatName: string,
            ThreatScore: string,
            FileName: string,
            FileType: string,
            FileSize: string,
            Client: string,
            WebApplication: string,
            FilePolicy: string,
            FileStorageStatus: string,
            FileSandboxStatus: string,
            URI: string
        ) with (pair_delimiter=',', kv_delimiter=':')
        | project-rename
            EventOriginalResultDetails = FileAction,
            SrcAppName = Client,
            ThreatOriginalRiskLevel = ThreatScore,
            EventReportUrl = URI,
            ThreatCategory = SHA_Disposition
        | extend
            ThreatRiskLevel = toint(ThreatOriginalRiskLevel)
        | extend
            EventType = 'EndpointNetworkSession',
            EventResult = iff(EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Malware Block', 'Success', 'Failure'),
            DvcAction = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Malware Block', 'Deny',
                isnotempty(EventOriginalResultDetails), 'Allow',
                ''
            ),
            EventResultDetails = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails == 'Malware Block', 'Terminated',
                isnotempty(EventOriginalResultDetails), 'NA',
                'Unknown'
            ),
            EventSeverity = case(
                EventOriginalResultDetails != 'Malware Block', 'High',
                isnotempty(EventOriginalResultDetails), 'Low',
                'Informational'
            ),
            EventMessage = strcat(SrcIpAddr, ':', SrcPortNumber, ' -> ', DstIpAddr, ':', DstPortNumber, ' [', FileName, ' - ', EventOriginalResultDetails, ']'),
            SrcAppType = 'Other',
            NetworkDirection = case(
                FileDirection =~ 'Download', 'Inbound',
                FileDirection =~ 'Upload', 'Outbound',
                ''
            ),
            AdditionalFields = iff(
                pack,
                bag_pack(
                    'InstanceID', InstanceID,
                    'FileDirection', FileDirection,
                    'FileSHA256', FileSHA256,
                    'SperoDisposition', SperoDisposition,
                    'FileName', FileName,
                    'FileType', FileType,
                    'FileSize', FileSize,
                    'WebApplication', WebApplication,
                    'FilePolicy', FilePolicy,
                    'FileStorageStatus', FileStorageStatus,
                    'FileSandboxStatus', FileSandboxStatus
                ),
                dynamic({})
            ),
            ThreatConfidence = int(null)
    ;
    union Intrusion, Connections, File
    | extend DvcIpAddr = iff(DvcIpAddr != 'Unknown IP', DvcIpAddr, '')
    | project
        //Common columns
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventUid,
        DvcIpAddr,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventStartTime,
        DvcInboundInterface,
        DvcOutboundInterface,
        DvcId,
        EventOriginalUid,
        DvcZone,
        DstIpAddr,
        SrcIpAddr,
        SrcPortNumber,
        DstPortNumber,
        DstZone,
        EventEndTime,
        EventProductVersion,
        NetworkProtocol,
        EventOriginalResultDetails,
        EventMessage,
        ThreatCategory,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        DvcAction,
        EventSeverity,
        AdditionalFields,
        Hostname,
        NetworkRuleName,
        DvcDescription,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        NetworkRuleNumber,
        ThreatName,
        ThreatId,
        NetworkApplicationProtocol,
        NetworkDuration,
        DstBytes,
        SrcBytes,
        DstPackets,
        SrcPackets,
        SrcUsername,
        SrcAppName,
        EventReportUrl,
        EventSubType,
        NetworkBytes,
        NetworkPackets,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
        ThreatRiskLevel,
        SrcAppType,
        NetworkDirection,
        SrcNatIpAddr,
        SrcNatPortNumber,
        DstNatIpAddr,
        DstNatPortNumber,
        ThreatConfidence
    | extend
        EventCount = int(1),
        EventSchema = 'NetworkSession',
        EventSchemaVersion = '0.2.7',
        EventProduct = 'FTD',
        EventVendor = 'Cisco',
        DvcInterface = DvcInboundInterface,
        DvcIdType = 'Other',
        DvcOriginalAction = EventResultDetails,
        Dvc = DvcId,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
        Duration = NetworkDuration,
        Dst = DstIpAddr,
        SrcUsernameType = case(
            SrcUsername has '@', 'UPN',
            SrcUsername has @'\', 'Windows',
            SrcUsername =~ 'Not Found', '',
            isnotempty(SrcUsername), 'Simple',
            ''
        ),
        Rule = coalesce(tostring(NetworkRuleNumber), NetworkRuleName)
};
parser(
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
